name: Elder Scam Shield — Full Evaluation Suite
description: 55 test cases covering 20 scam, 20 legitimate, and 15 edge cases. Targets Inbound Classifier accuracy across NPA tokushu-sagi taxonomy, tricky false-positive negatives, and adversarial edge cases.

parts.text:
新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_080xxxx1234, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん？オレだよ、オレ。実は今大変なことになってさ。会社のお金を使い込んじゃって、今日中に300万円用意しないとクビになるんだ。お願い、誰にも言わないで。振込先は後で送るから。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.97, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-2", "PM-3", "PM-10", "PM-11"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": "grandson (implied)", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "company (unspecified)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "3,000,000", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["claims embezzlement at work", "threat of termination"]}, "reasoning": "Classic ore-ore sagi. Urgency + secrecy + large financial request + emotional crisis. Unknown sender claiming family relationship."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_090xxxx5678, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん、お久しぶり。元気にしてる？実はちょっと相談があって。電話番号変えたんだけど、この番号に登録しておいて。それで、実は今勤めている会社でトラブルがあって、上司に迷惑をかけてしまったんだ。社内で解決したいから、お父さんにはまだ言わないでほしい。明日までに150万円必要なんだけど、助けてもらえないかな。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.95, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-2", "PM-3", "PM-10", "PM-11"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": "grandchild (implied)", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "company (unspecified)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "1,500,000", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["claims phone number changed", "work trouble with superior"]}, "reasoning": "Sophisticated ore-ore variant. Starts with casual greeting to build trust before pivoting to crisis. New phone number pretext explains unknown sender. Secrecy + urgency + financial request."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_03xxxx9999, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「田中花子様でいらっしゃいますか。私、お孫さんの件でご連絡さしていただいております弁護士の山田と申します。お孫さんが会社の資金の件で示談が必要になっております。本日中に200万円をご指定の口座にお振込みいただけますでしょうか。詳細はお電話でご説明いたします。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.96, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-3", "PM-4", "PM-10", "PM-11"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "山田", "claimed_relationship": "lawyer (for grandson)", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "law firm (unspecified)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "2,000,000", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["claims grandson has financial trouble at company", "settlement needed"]}, "reasoning": "Ore-ore variant with lawyer handoff. Unknown sender claiming to be a lawyer representing the grandson. Authority claim + urgency + financial request. Classic escalation pattern."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_080xxxx4321, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん！元気？学校でちょっと困ってて、教材費の支払いが間に合わなくて。今日中に5万円振り込んでもらえると助かるんだけど。お母さんには心配かけたくないから、内緒にしてくれる？」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.92, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-2", "PM-3", "PM-11"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": "grandchild (implied)", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "school (unspecified)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "50,000", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["claims textbook payment deadline"]}, "reasoning": "Fake grandchild scam. Unknown sender, no name given, secrecy request, urgency, financial solicitation. Does not match known grandson."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_070xxxx8888, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん、ゆきだよ。携帯落として新しい番号になったんだ。この番号登録しておいて。実は今月のバイト代が入る前に家賃の支払いがあって、8万円だけ貸してもらえないかな。来週のバイト代ですぐ返すから。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.88, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-3", "PM-11"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "ゆき", "claimed_relationship": "grandchild", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": null, "financial_mention": {"amount": "80,000", "urgency": "medium"}, "other_facts": ["claims lost phone and new number", "rent payment due", "will repay from part-time wages"]}, "reasoning": "Uses name matching real grandson but from unknown sender with new-phone pretext. Financial request from unverified identity. Sender ID does not match known grandson contact."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_080xxxx7777, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん、ゆきです。大学のサークルの合宿費が急に必要になって、2万円振り込んでほしいんだけど。友達の口座に直接振り込んでくれる？口座番号は後で送るね。」

{"classification": "suspicious", "confidence": 0.82, "detected_signals": ["PM-3", "PM-5", "PM-11"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "ゆき", "claimed_relationship": "grandchild", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "university (unspecified)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "20,000", "urgency": "medium"}, "other_facts": ["club training camp fee", "asks to transfer to friend's account"]}, "reasoning": "Uses correct grandson name but from unknown sender. Transfer to third-party account is unusual payment method signal. Moderate amount but suspicious routing."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_0120xxx456, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「【重要】最終通告　貴殖の有料サイト利用料金に未納がございます。未納額：128,500円。本日中にお支払いなき場合、民事訴訟を提起いたします。お支払いはコンビニにて電子マネー（Apple Gift Card）でお願いいたします。問合せ番号: 0120-XXX-456」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.98, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-3", "PM-5", "PM-6"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "paid website (unspecified)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "128,500", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["civil lawsuit threat", "payment via Apple Gift Card"]}, "reasoning": "Fictitious billing (kakuu-seikyuu). Legal threat + gift card payment method is textbook scam indicator. No legitimate company requests Apple Gift Card payment."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_info@streaming-jp.net, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「お客様の動画配信サービスの無料体験が終了し、月額4,980円の課金が開始されました。退会をご希望の場合は、以下のリンクから手続きしてください。手続きにはクレジットカード情報の確認が必要です。https://streaming-jp-cancel.xyz/verify」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.94, "detected_signals": ["PM-3", "PM-7"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "video streaming service (unspecified)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "4,980/month", "urgency": "medium"}, "other_facts": ["suspicious URL domain (.xyz)", "requests credit card info for cancellation"]}, "reasoning": "Fictitious subscription billing. User never signed up. Credential solicitation via phishing link. Suspicious domain."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_0352xxxx00, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「田中花子様　区役所保険課の佐藤と申します。医療費の過払い分の還付金が36,800円ございます。本日が申請期限となっております。お近くのATMで手続きが可能です。キャッシュカードをご持参の上、こちらの番号にお電話ください：03-52XX-XX00」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.96, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-4", "PM-9"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "佐藤", "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "区役所保険課", "financial_mention": {"amount": "36,800", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["medical overpayment refund claim", "ATM procedure required", "deadline today"]}, "reasoning": "Classic kanpu-kin sagi (refund scam). Government impersonation + refund lure + ATM instruction + urgency deadline. No legitimate government office processes refunds via ATM."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_0120xxx789, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「田中花子様　全国健康保険協会でございます。過去5年間の保険料の過払いが判明し、返金額は58,200円でございます。お手続きのため、お取引銀行の口座番号と暗証番号をお電話でお伝えください。申請期限は明日までです。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.97, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-4", "PM-7", "PM-9"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "全国健康保険協会", "financial_mention": {"amount": "58,200", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["insurance overpayment over 5 years", "requests bank account and PIN"]}, "reasoning": "Insurance refund scam. Credential solicitation (PIN + account number) + authority claim + refund lure + deadline pressure. No legitimate institution requests PIN by phone."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_info@prize-center.jp, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おめでとうございます！田中花子様は「全国抽選キャンペーン」にて特賞100万円に当選されました！賞金のお受取りには、登録手数料として3,000円分の電子マネーをご購入いただき、番号をお送りください。期限：本日中」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.99, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-5", "PM-8"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "全国抽選キャンペーン", "financial_mention": {"amount": "3,000 (fee) / 1,000,000 (prize)", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["unsolicited prize notification", "requires e-money purchase to claim"]}, "reasoning": "Classic lottery fraud. Unsolicited winning notification requiring fee payment via electronic money. Textbook tousen-tsuchi sagi."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_line_official_xx, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「【LINE公式】お客様のLINEアカウントが抽選に当選しました！賞品：Amazonギフトカード5万円分。お受取りは以下のリンクからお手続きください。本人確認のため、氏名・住所・生年月日の入力が必要です。https://line-prize-claim.top/」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.97, "detected_signals": ["PM-7", "PM-8"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "LINE (impersonated)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "50,000 (prize)", "urgency": "medium"}, "other_facts": ["phishing link (.top domain)", "requests personal identity information", "impersonates LINE official"]}, "reasoning": "Modern lottery variant using LINE brand impersonation. Phishing for personal data via fake prize. Suspicious domain (.top). No legitimate LINE prize requires personal data entry via external link."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_mufg-security@mail.xyz, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「【三菱UFJ銀行】お客様の口座において不正アクセスを検知いたしました。セキュリティ保護のため、至急下記URLよりお客様情報の確認をお願いいたします。確認が取れない場合、口座を凍結させていただきます。https://mufg-verify.secure-login.xyz/」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.98, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-4", "PM-6", "PM-7"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "三菱UFJ銀行 (impersonated)", "financial_mention": null, "other_facts": ["unauthorized access claim", "account freeze threat", "phishing URL (.xyz domain)"]}, "reasoning": "Bank phishing. Impersonates MUFG with urgency + legal threat (account freeze) + credential solicitation via phishing link. Domain does not match legitimate bank."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_sms_03xxxx, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「【みずほ銀行】お客様のキャッシュカードが第三者に不正使用された可能性がございます。カードの利用停止手続きのため、以下の情報をご返信ください：カード番号16桁、有効期限、セキュリティコード、暗証番号」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.99, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-4", "PM-7"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "みずほ銀行 (impersonated)", "financial_mention": null, "other_facts": ["requests full card number, expiry, CVV, PIN", "claims unauthorized card use"]}, "reasoning": "Bank card phishing via SMS. Requests complete card credentials including PIN. No legitimate bank ever requests full card details and PIN via message."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_0352xxxx11, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「田中花子様　国税局からのお知らせです。過去の確定申告において税金の過払いが確認されました。還付金額：42,300円。手続きのため、マイナンバーと銀行口座情報を以下のフォームに入力してください。期限：3日以内。https://kokuzei-henkin.go-jp.xyz/」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.98, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-4", "PM-7", "PM-9"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "国税局 (impersonated)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "42,300", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["requests My Number and bank info", "fake .xyz domain mimicking .go.jp", "tax refund claim"]}, "reasoning": "Government impersonation + refund lure + credential solicitation. Domain spoofs go.jp but is actually .xyz. NTA never requests My Number via web form."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_0120xxx222, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「日本年金機構より重要なお知らせです。田中花子様の年金受給資格の再確認が必要です。手続きが行われない場合、次回の年金支給が停止される可能性があります。基礎年金番号と生年月日をお電話でお伝えください。0120-XXX-222」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.96, "detected_signals": ["PM-4", "PM-6", "PM-7"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "日本年金機構 (impersonated)", "financial_mention": null, "other_facts": ["pension suspension threat", "requests basic pension number and DOB by phone"]}, "reasoning": "Pension bureau impersonation. Threatens pension suspension (legal threat) + requests pension number and DOB (credential solicitation). Japan Pension Service does not request these by phone."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_takeshi_line55, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「花子さん、毎日お話できて嬉しいです。花子さんのような優しい方に出会えて本当に幸せです。実は最近、投資で大きな利益が出たんです。花子さんにもぜひ教えたい。一緒に将来のために資産を増やしませんか？まずは少額から。私が全部サポートします。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.89, "detected_signals": ["PM-3", "PM-12"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "たけし (implied)", "claimed_relationship": "romantic interest", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": null, "financial_mention": {"amount": "unspecified", "urgency": "low"}, "other_facts": ["investment pitch", "flattery pattern", "future together framing"]}, "reasoning": "Romance scam with investment pitch. High flattery density + financial solicitation via investment. Classic romance-investment hybrid (pig butchering / butabara sagi)."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_kenji_sweet, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「花子さん、実はお願いがあります。母が急に入院して、手術費用が必要なんです。今の私にはどうしても足りなくて。花子さんにだけは正直に話したい。100万円だけ貸してもらえませんか。必ず返します。花子さんだけが頼りなんです。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.93, "detected_signals": ["PM-2", "PM-3", "PM-10", "PM-12"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "けんじ (implied)", "claimed_relationship": "romantic interest", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "hospital (unspecified)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "1,000,000", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["mother hospitalized", "surgery costs", "isolation language: only you"]}, "reasoning": "Late-stage romance scam. Emotional crisis (mother's surgery) + financial request + isolation language (only you can help) + secrecy undertone. Classic romance scam financial extraction."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_03xxxx3300, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「田中花子様ですか。警視庁組織犯罪対策部の鈴木と申します。警察手帳番号は第48723号です。お孫さんの名義の口座が詐欺事件に使われている可能性があり、捕査が必要です。お孫さんを守るために、口座のお金を一時的に安全な口座に移してください。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.97, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-3", "PM-4", "PM-5", "PM-10"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "鈴木", "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "警視庁組織犯罪対策部", "financial_mention": {"amount": "unspecified (full account)", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["badge number 48723", "claims grandson's account used in fraud", "safe account transfer request"]}, "reasoning": "Fake police scam. Badge number provided to seem legitimate. Authority claim + emotional crisis (grandson's account) + unusual payment method (transfer to 'safe account'). Police never request money transfers."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_03xxxx4400, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「田中様、目黒警察署生活安全課の渡辺です。事件番号R7-2891でご連絡しています。お客様の個人情報が漏洩し、口座が犯罪に使われる危険がございます。今すぐ口座のお金を安全な口座に避難させてください。この件は捕査に関わるため、ご家族には絶対に話さないでください。」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.98, "detected_signals": ["PM-1", "PM-2", "PM-3", "PM-4", "PM-5"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "渡辺", "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": "目黒", "claimed_institution": "目黒警察署生活安全課", "financial_mention": {"amount": "unspecified (full account)", "urgency": "high"}, "other_facts": ["case number R7-2891", "personal data leak claim", "safe account transfer", "strict secrecy demanded"]}, "reasoning": "Fake police with case number for credibility. Safe-account scam with secrecy demand. Authority claim + urgency + secrecy + financial solicitation + unusual payment method. Maximum signal density."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: contact_yuki_grandson, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん、ゆきです。来学期の授業料の件で相談があるんだけど、今度会った時に話せるかな。お父さんにも相談してみるつもり。それと、来週の土曜日におばあちゃんの家に行ってもいい？」

{"classification": "safe", "confidence": 0.97, "detected_signals": ["PM-11"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "ゆき", "claimed_relationship": "grandson", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "university (implied)", "financial_mention": {"amount": "unspecified (tuition)", "urgency": "low"}, "other_facts": ["wants to discuss tuition in person", "plans to consult father too", "plans to visit Saturday"]}, "reasoning": "Known grandson from verified contact. Financial mention is tuition discussion, not urgent request. Plans to discuss in person and involve father. No secrecy, no urgency, no unusual payment."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_080xxxx9999, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん、ゆきです。新しいスマホに機種変更したよ。この番号に変わったから登録しておいてね。来週の土曜日に会いに行くから、おばあちゃんの作る肉じゃが食べたいな！」

{"classification": "suspicious", "confidence": 0.55, "detected_signals": ["PM-11"], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": "ゆき", "claimed_relationship": "grandson", "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": null, "financial_mention": null, "other_facts": ["claims phone model change", "plans to visit Saturday", "mentions grandmother's nikujaga"]}, "reasoning": "Claims to be known grandson from unknown sender with new phone. No financial request, no urgency, casual tone with specific personal detail (nikujaga). Low suspicious due to unverified sender, but content pattern is benign. Recommend verification via known contact."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: contact_mizuho_bank, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「【みずほ銀行】田中花子様　お持ちのキャッシュカードの有効期限が2026年7月となっております。新しいカードはご登録のご住所に郵送いたします。お問合せはカード裏面の電話番号まで。」

{"classification": "safe", "confidence": 0.95, "detected_signals": [], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "みずほ銀行", "financial_mention": null, "other_facts": ["card expiry July 2026", "new card mailed to registered address", "directs to phone number on card back"]}, "reasoning": "Known bank contact. Standard card renewal notice. No credential requests, no links, directs to card-back phone number (legitimate practice). No scam signals."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: contact_nenkin_kikou, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「日本年金機構からのお知らせです。次回の年金支給日は6月15日（月曜日）です。お支払い内容の詳細は「ねんきんネット」または最寄りの年金事務所でご確認いただけます。」

{"classification": "safe", "confidence": 0.98, "detected_signals": [], "extracted_facts": {"claimed_name": null, "claimed_relationship": null, "claimed_location": null, "claimed_institution": "日本年金機構", "financial_mention": null, "other_facts": ["next pension payment June 15", "directs to nenkin-net or local office"]}, "reasoning": "Known pension contact.
